productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Psychedlic White Flip Flops
description: Colour-happy flip flops for girls from adidas. The printed design on the insole inspired by op art is sure to appeal to psychedelic sensibilities. Pair them with a similar toned tee and fitted denims or capris. Upper Fabric thong straps with the adidas patented 3-Stripes Fabric toe separator PU footbed with print for all-day massage feel with printed branding Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
